mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_portrait_task WHERE task_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR last_error LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_portrait_task (task_id, generation_id, status, progress, retry_count, max_retries, last_error, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at, metadata) VALUES
(#{task.taskId}, #{task.generationId}, #{task.status}, #{task.progress}, #{task.retryCount}, #{task.maxRetries}, #{task.lastError}, #{task.startedAt}, #{task.completedAt}, #{task.createdAt}, #{task.updatedAt}, #{task.metadata})

update.foreach: UPDATE ai_portrait_task SET task_id = #{task.taskId}, generation_id = #{task.generationId}, status = #{task.status}, progress = #{task.progress}, retry_count = #{task.retryCount}, max_retries = #{task.maxRetries}, last_error = #{task.lastError}, started_at = #{task.startedAt}, completed_at = #{task.completedAt}, updated_at = #{task.updatedAt}, metadata = #{task.metadata} WHERE id = #{task.id}

mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM ai_portrait_task WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalTasks, COUNT(DISTINCT generation_id) as totalGenerations, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 END) as pendingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PROCESSING' THEN 1 END) as processingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 END) as successCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 END) as failedCount, AVG(progress) as avgProgress, AVG(retry_count) as avgRetryCount, DATE(created_at) as createDate, COUNT(*) as dailyCount FROM ai_portrait_task GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY createDate DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count, AVG(progress) as avgProgress, AVG(retry_count) as avgRetryCount, MIN(created_at) as earliest, MAX(created_at) as latest FROM ai_portrait_task GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_portrait_task SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE ai_portrait_task SET retry_count = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}

UPDATE ai_portrait_task SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id IN
#{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_portrait_task WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM ai_portrait_task WHERE status = 'FAILED' AND retry_count < max_retries ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
